name: Georgia
agency: Georgia Secretary of State, Corporations Division
address: 2 Martin Luther King Jr. Dr. SE, Suite 313 West Tower, Atlanta, GA 30334

steps: Vote to dissolve per operating agreement or majority of members
Wind up business affairs and settle debts
File Certificate of Termination (Form CD 415) online through eCorp portal
No filing fee for online filing ($10 service charge for paper filing)
File final state tax returns with Georgia Department of Revenue
llc.notes: No fee for online filing through eCorp. Paper filing incurs a $10 service charge. Georgia LLCs file a Certificate of Termination rather than Articles of Dissolution.

corporation.formName: Notice of Intent to Dissolve / Articles of Dissolution
steps: Board of directors adopts resolution recommending dissolution
Shareholders approve dissolution by majority vote
File Notice of Intent to Dissolve (Form CD 410) with Secretary of State
Wind up business affairs, notify creditors, and settle debts
File Articles of Dissolution (Form CD 411) with Secretary of State after winding up
No filing fee for online filing ($10 service charge for paper filing)
File final state tax returns with Georgia Department of Revenue
corporation.notes: No fee for online filing through eCorp. Paper filing incurs a $10 service charge. Corporation dissolution is a two-step process: first file Notice of Intent to Dissolve, then Articles of Dissolution after winding up.

tax.notes: File final Georgia corporate income tax return (Form 600 or 600S). Close all state tax accounts including sales tax and withholding accounts.

requirements.publicationDetails: Corporations must publish notice of intent to dissolve in the legal organ of the county where the registered office is located, once a week for two consecutive weeks. $40 newspaper fee. LLCs are exempt from publication.
requirements.employeeNotification: Follow federal WARN Act if 100+ employees
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors in writing; publish notice for unknown creditors
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Registered agent must be maintained until dissolution is complete
requirements.windingUpPeriod: Reasonable time to wind up affairs after filing Notice of Intent to Dissolve
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: Majority vote of members (LLC) or shareholders (Corp) required

includes: Every required form with direct download links
